creator: luca@asgard.ch
text:
Dear all

This port is no longer valid and should be disabled. It depends on postsrsd 1.x, which used TCP sockets. In the meantime, postsrsd underwent a redesign and now uses UNIX sockets. Thus, the related postforward port no longer works and would need a refactor from the maintainer as well.

References:
https://github.com/zoni/postforward
https://github.com/roehling/postsrsd

I suggest disabling/deleting this port.

Regards
Gian Luca
